'''''Bravo 6''''', or '''''Bravo Six''''', was an [[N-1 starfighter]]<ref name="IncrediBuilds" /> manufactured by [[Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps]]<ref name="Vehicles" /> that flew as part of the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]]' [[Bravo Squadron]]. The [[R2-series astromech droid]] [[R2-C4 (Naboo)|R2-C4]] was often assigned to the [[starfighter]]'s [[astromech socket]].<ref name="IncrediBuilds" /> The starfighter was assigned to pilot [[Gavyn Sykes]].<ref name="SWZ" />

{{Ship-stub}}
